title: microcala quadrangularis
intro: Microcala quadrangularis, also known as Microcala, is a type of flowering plant in the bryophyte family that grows in moist, humid environments. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microcala include its ability to relieve congestion and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Microcala can be prepared as a tea by infusing the plant in hot water or as a tincture by steeping the leaves in a solvent, allowing for convenient consumption of its medicinal properties.
